Notes: Trigger an UPDATE-time attempt to add an A RR at an owner name that already has a CNAME. RFC 2181 forbids coexistence, but RFC 2136 does not prescribe a unique UPDATE error mapping or state transition for this semantic conflict.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add an A RR at cname.campus.edu., which already owns a CNAME. The prerequisite ensures the owner name is in use so the conflict is specifically CNAME exclusivity, not missing-name handling.

Steps.Name: cname.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the original CNAME remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: cname.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A RR was committed, rejected, or ignored.
